tasks.description: Ensure the connectivity check avoids excessive timeouts or fork/exec overhead. Limit the connection timeout of the HTTP request to prevent the CI pipeline from hanging.
Review the trap commands in custom bash scripts to ensure they minimize subshell overhead and use native variables efficiently.
Review the trap commands in custom bash scripts to ensure they minimize subshell overhead and use native variables efficiently.
Monitor documentation updates to ensure no heavy assets are added that could bloat the repository or ISO size.
Ensure no large assets or images are added during the documentation update.
Ensure no large assets or images are added during the documentation update.
Ensure the addition of python-yaml to the test job's pacman command does not introduce a measurable delay in CI startup times. The test job must remain extremely fast to provide quick feedback.
Verify that the added systemd sandboxing directives do not introduce measurable performance regressions during service startup.

Ensure the ShellCheck script uses efficient file discovery methods (e.g., specific `find` commands targeting `tests/` and `airootfs/usr/local/bin/`) rather than exhaustive, unoptimized searches across the entire repository to minimize CI runtime.
